name: friend-guard
description_fr: Tous les Pokémon alliés subissent 0.75× de dégâts directs des capacités tant que ce Pokémon est au combat.  Cet effet se cumule si plusieurs Pokémon alliés l’ont.
description_en: All friendly Pokémon take 0.75× as much direct damage from moves while this Pokémon is in battle.  This effect stacks if multiple allied Pokémon have it.
